Class TaskManager

java.lang.Object
main.java.taskmanager.service.TaskManager
public class TaskManager extends Object
Service class responsible for managing tasks

The TaskManager owns the current task list and uses TaskRepository to load and save the tasks

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    TaskManager(TaskRepository taskRepository)

  • Constructor Details

    • TaskManager

      public TaskManager(TaskRepository taskRepository)

  • Method Details

    • getTasks

      public List<Task> getTasks()
      Returns a copy of the current task list

      Modifications to the returned list do not affect the internal task list managed by TaskManager

      Returns:
      a list containing all current tasks

    • createTask

      public void createTask(String taskDescription, LocalDateTime taskDueDate)
      Creates a new Task
      Parameters:
      taskDescription - description of the task
      taskDueDate - date the task is due

    • markTaskComplete

      public boolean markTaskComplete(UUID taskId)
      Marks the task relating to the ID provided as complete
      Parameters:
      taskId - the UUID of the task that you want to mark as completed
      Returns:
      returns true if a task can be found and marked as completed, otherwise false

    • reopenTask

      public boolean reopenTask(UUID taskId)
      Reopens the task with the given UUID
      Parameters:
      taskId - the UUID of the task that you want to reopen
      Returns:
      returns true if the task can be found and reopened, otherwise false.

    • deleteTask

      public boolean deleteTask(UUID taskId)
      Removes a task with a valid id from the list
      Parameters:
      taskId - UUID of the task that should be removed
      Returns:
      returns true if task is found and can be removed, otherwise false.
